scripts.start: npm --prefix frontend run build && SERVE_FRONTEND=true ENABLE_CORS=false npm --prefix backend run start
scripts.prebuild: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.postinstall: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.start:single: npm --prefix frontend run build && SERVE_FRONTEND=true ENABLE_CORS=false npm --prefix backend run start
scripts.dev:single: SERVE_FRONTEND=true ENABLE_CORS=false npm --prefix backend run dev
